title: Customer gets signed up for retailer credit card without his consent
summary: While shopping in a retail store, an individual was approached by a salesperson and asked to join a loyalty program. He agreed to join the loyalty program, and provided the salesperson with his driver’s licence to complete the registration. The individual was surprised to receive a credit card from the bank associated with the retailer a...
